basic_info.name: Arch Design Award and Competition 2026
basic_info.description: The Early Registration for the Arch Design Award 2026 is open! The mission of the Arch Design Award is to highlight the most interesting, well-designed, innovative solutions in the disciplines of Architectural and Interior Design. This Award honors talented designers, helps to increase their recognition and boost their visibility.

April, 2026.  24:00 GMT+3 1+1 Early Registration Offer Until: Expanded Award Categories* Architectural Design Category Interior Design Category Lighting Design Category * Furniture and Product Design Category * Packaging and Graphic Design Category * Interior Design Category Celebrates exceptional interior spaces that balance functionality and aesthetics. This category includes residential, commercial, hospitality, cultural, and exhibition interiors that enhance user experience through thoughtful design and atmosphere. Registration © Meldoy Lau Architectural Design Category Honours innovative architectural projects that shape the built environment. This category welcomes designs that respond creatively to context, structure, and human needs, transforming spaces into inspiring works of architecture. Registration © PT Architecture Design (Beijing) Co.,Ltd. Furniture and Product Design Category Highlights original furniture and product designs that combine beauty, functionality, and innovation. This category includes everyday objects, and systems that improve how people live, work, and interact. Registration © Jonathan Nieh Lighting Design Category Showcases imaginative and impactful lighting designs that define mood and atmosphere. This category covers lighting products, installations, and architectural applications that elevate environments through the art of light. Registration © Matej Stefanac Packaging and Graphic Design Category Recognises exceptional packaging and branding that convey identity and creativity through compelling visuals, refined structure, and engaging storytelling across physical and digital platforms. Registration © Visual identity Zone Eight of Shu-Te University Read More The Arch Design Award celebrates excellence and innovation across the creative disciplines that shape our built and visual environment. The program recognises remarkable achievements in Architectural Design, Interior Design, Furniture and Product Design, Lighting Design, and Packaging and Graphic Design. Open to designers, studios, and creative professionals worldwide, the award honours projects that push boundaries, elevate everyday experiences, and inspire through design. Winners establish their reputation on an international stage, gaining visibility that strengthens their professional and creative journey. a visual bridge between inside and outside. The Arch Prizes The  Metal Arch Trophy with free international shipping Digital Arch Design Award Winner Certificate Arch Winner Logos and Banners DAA Membership Program Premium Marketing Package  and Interview Right to purchase the Exclusive Crystal Glass Arch Trophy Discover the Winners' Kit Newsletter Join to the Arch Design Award Newsletter and be the first to hear about the latest news. Special offers and exclusive deals are available only for subscribers. First Name Last Name E-Mail I agree to the Terms & Conditions Subscribe Thank you for subscribing! Q: What is ARCH-ID and how can I get it? A: ARCH-ID is a personal code, it helps to identify the Designers and the Submitted Designs. You will receive your ARCH-ID within 3 business days after you purchased a  Registration Ticket .   Q: I have a Registration Ticket, can I submit my Design later? A:  Yes, of course! You will be allowed to submit your project at any time, before the final submission deadline: 05 March 2025, 24:00 GMT+3. Please note, the registration fees are constantly increasing during the different registration periods, we advise you to buy the Registration Ticket(s) at a discounted price in advance as you can submit your Design later. Q: Are there any extra fees for the Winners to receive the Winners' Kit? A: There are no hidden costs and expenses in Arch Design Award. The Early, Standard Late and Final Registration Tickets include everything except the Exclusive Crystal Glass Trophy.   FAQs Arch Design Award ' 22 ' 23 ' 24  ' 25 ' 26   ' 27 ​ info@archdesignaward.com Need any Help? ©  Guangzhou Metro Design & Research Institute Co.,Ltd. / Vantree Design Back to Top Managed by DAA - Design Award Agency Business ID: 3148527-4 VAT ID: FI31485274 Antinkatu 3D, 7th floor 00100 Helsinki, Finland +358 44 944 7802 info@archdesignaward.com Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Cookie Policy Fullfilment Policy Cancellation Policy Site Links Arch Registration ​ Submit   ​ Winners ​ Contact Winners´Kit Prizes Metal Arch Trophy Crystal Glass Arch Trophy FAQs ​ Join Today ​ ​ © 2026  Arch Design Award powered by DAA-Design Award Agency bottom of page
